name: Okra Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a pan until crispy. Remove and drain on paper towels.
2. Chop the onions and peppers. Add to the bacon drippings and cook until onions are golden.
3. Chop the tomatoes and add them to the onion mixture. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 20 minutes.
4. Add the okra and continue cooking until tender.
5. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
6. Top with crumbled bacon before serving.
